reviews.comment:
Una porquería. Es YPF Full y a las 13hs no tenían ningún tipo de comida caliente. Sólo medialunas. Y sándwiches pedorros en una heladera. Desastre.
Solo se las recomiendo para cargar nafta porque en la Petrobras no tienen.

(Translated by Google)
It's a dump. It's a YPF Full station, and at 1 PM they didn't have any hot food. Just croissants and some lousy sandwiches in a refrigerator. A disaster. I only recommend it for gas because Petrobras doesn't have any.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnX2FXbUJBEAE
